title: Brazilian Iron Ore Export Shift Continues
section_path: Brazilian Iron Ore Export Shift Continues
section_path_text: Brazilian Iron Ore Export Shift Continues
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Brazil most recently exported 33.8 million tons of iron ore in October, which marked a month-on-month decline of 1.9 million tons (-5%) but a year-on-year increase of 7 million tons (26%). While down again on a month-on-month basis, 33.8 million tons is a firm amount that is much higher than was exported back in October 2022. Also significant is that the last three months have seen Brazil's exports total 107 million tons.
